statement.en: Vacuum Mechanics: How the Quaternion Finally Made the Standard Model Make Sense
statement.summary: The vacuum is treated as a quaternionic elastic condensate

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a 2026-dated preprint proposing non-standard mathematical formalism (quaternionic condensate models) for vacuum mechanics. The claim that quaternions 'finally make the Standard Model make sense' is provisional and not yet validated by peer review or experimental confirmation. The work appears to be under active development rather than established fact or refutation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 真空は四元数のテンソル積として、熱力学的に凝縮する
